behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at module handoff (summary write path must read stored findings). REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP: no model-output dependence. MULTI-STEP: no multi-agent chain. Slot A: "blocked when any stored dimension finding ... has a FAIL verdict." Slot B: handoff. Slot C: Unit miss: a function-only test can pass while repository query/filter by round is wrong, allowing PASS write. Rejection-gate: rejected System because behavior text is only about "stored ... finding" consistency, not real infra.
behaviors.test_description: Wire summary service + findings repository (test DB or in-memory repo with realistic query semantics). Attempt to persist PASS summary for a round containing one FAIL finding; assert write is rejected and error references conflicting dimension.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: bug appears when gate module consumes persisted findings vs summary text. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess needed. LLM-DEP: no model-quality dependency. MULTI-STEP: no multi-agent sequence. Slot A: "reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on ... summary text." Slot B: handoff. Slot C: Unit miss: pure gate-function test with injected precomputed findings would not catch wrong data-source wiring to summary field. Rejection-gate: rejected Agentic because behavior text is about data-source selection in gate logic, not model decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Set stored findings to include a FAIL while summary text says all PASS. Run stop-gate computation through real service/repo wiring; assert verdict is FAIL/escalate based on findings, not summary string.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: requires interaction between write API, authorization/flag check, and audit log persistence. REAL-INFRA: local module wiring is sufficient; no real network/OS primitive required. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: none. Slot A: "require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record." Slot B: handoff. Slot C: Unit miss: function-level validation might pass while audit record is not actually persisted/linked to request. Rejection-gate: rejected System because behavior does not require real external audit service; local persistence catches boundary failure.
behaviors.test_description: Invoke summary override path twice: without override flag (assert reject), and with override flag (assert accept + warning audit record persisted with actor, round, timestamp, reason).

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the gate requires a review round identifier produced after the latest fix commit before PASS can be finalized.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: correctness depends on comparing commit metadata and review-round metadata across modules/storage. REAL-INFRA: no mandatory real git subprocess if commit SHA/timestamps are already stored artifacts. LLM-DEP: none in this behavior text. MULTI-STEP: not required; single gating decision on metadata ordering. Slot A: "requires a review round identifier produced after the latest fix commit." Slot B: handoff. Slot C: Unit miss: isolated comparator test can pass while wrong repo query returns stale round id and gate still finalizes PASS. Rejection-gate: rejected System because text requires ordering of stored identifiers, not real git command behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Seed latest fix commit C2 and two review rounds (R1 before C2, R2 after C2). Assert PASS finalization fails with R1 and succeeds only with R2 through full gate + repository wiring.

behaviors.description: In the live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: a stubbed agent completion can hide failures where the real review-agent run is skipped/fails to produce new round artifacts on updated diff. REAL-INFRA: may use local orchestration, but decisive risk is real AI call path. LLM-DEP: yes; behavior explicitly requires an actual "review-agent round" in live loop. MULTI-STEP: single required agentic step before finalize, not a full multi-step chain. Slot A: "live review loop ... unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff." Slot B: model-output/real agentic execution boundary. Slot C: Integration miss: fake agent endpoint always returns success, masking production failure where no true fresh model run occurred. Rejection-gate: rejected Workflow because text mandates one fresh round gate, not multiple agentic decisions in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run live loop against real review-agent API/model. Apply fix commit, attempt PASS without triggering fresh round (assert blocked), then trigger real new round on updated diff and assert gate can proceed only after new round artifact exists.

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results, the outcome is escalation rather than PASS.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: requires combining round-counter state with persisted MUST-FIX findings at decision boundary. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess needed. LLM-DEP: not required by this behavior; it uses stored results already present. MULTI-STEP: sequence not required to be executed in test; only terminal decision from stored state. Slot A: "rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results ... escalation rather than PASS." Slot B: handoff. Slot C: Unit miss: logic-only test can miss mismatch between findings store schema/status mapping and gate decision input. Rejection-gate: rejected Agentic because behavior text anchors on "stored results" and exhaustion state, not evaluating fresh model judgment.
behaviors.test_description: Seed persisted state: max rounds reached, at least one unresolved MUST-FIX. Execute gate decision service end-to-end with repositories; assert final outcome is escalation and PASS is impossible.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: single-step or mocked flow can hide failures in cross-round state carryover and final escalation emission. REAL-INFRA: core boundary is multi-step agent pipeline, not OS primitive. LLM-DEP: yes, live review rounds are agentic. MULTI-STEP: explicit: "live multi-round review workflow" with exhaustion across rounds. Slot A: "live multi-round review workflow ... exhausted rounds ... unresolved MUST-FIX ... emit escalation." Slot B: multi-step agentic. Slot C: Agentic-only miss: one-round real model test will not catch bugs in round-to-round accumulation/exhaustion logic leading to accidental PASS. Rejection-gate: rejected System because the higher decisive boundary is sequential agentic workflow; system-only infra tests do not validate multi-round agentic handoffs.
behaviors.test_description: Execute full live pipeline across multiple real review-agent rounds on evolving diffs until round budget is exhausted while MUST-FIX remains unresolved. Assert PASS remains blocked and escalation event/record is emitted at workflow termination.
